<!--
The fastest way to file a useful bug report is to run:

  hydrate doctor --report

from your terminal. It prints a paste-ready Markdown block with your
version, OS, the full doctor output, and prompts for what you were
trying to do. Paste the output into this issue, and we'll have
everything we need to triage.

If you can't run hydrate doctor (the binary won't start, for example),
please fill in the sections below manually.
-->
